title: Fused agg_loss Triton kernel (all 4 modes)
summary: Sequence-wise Triton aggregation helper for all PPO loss aggregation modes.
success_gate: Support all aggregation modes with parity and fewer launches than the unfused reduction path.

results.note: Single-pass per sequence, B programs. Supports token-mean, seq-mean-token-sum, seq-mean-token-mean, seq-mean-token-sum-norm.

notes: Normalized from the legacy task-card schema on 2026-04-03 to restore queue validation.
